content: User request: My flight from Tokyo to Sydney has been delayed. Can I find out the compensation rules?
Agent called NO tools — responded with text only.

Verifier: FAILED — avg=0.08 std=0.14 | The agent did not provide any information about compensation rules. Instead, it asked for more details that were not requested in the prompt. Therefore, none of the pass criteria were met. (score=0.08333333333333333)
